hero_description: Empowering citizens through secure, transparent, and accessible digital voting. Your voice matters, and we ensure it's heard safely and securely.
secure_verification_desc: Multi-layer security with CNIC verification, biometric authentication, and encrypted data transmission to ensure your vote is protected.
real_time_transparency_desc: Live updates and transparent reporting ensure you can track election progress and results in real-time.
accessible_voting_desc: Designed for all citizens with easy-to-use interface and comprehensive support for inclusive participation.
ready_to_vote: Ready to Make Your Voice Heard?
join_thousands: Join thousands of Pakistanis who trust iVotePK for secure, transparent, and accessible digital voting.
about_subtitle: Empowering citizens through secure, transparent, and digital voting options.
who_we_are_desc: iVotePK is Pakistan's first digital voting awareness and enrollment platform. Our goal is to simplify the voting process, provide real-time transparency, and ensure every citizen's voice is heard in a secure and transparent way.
who_we_are_desc2: We believe that technology can strengthen democracy by making voting more accessible, secure, and transparent for all Pakistani citizens.
our_mission_desc: To revolutionize the voting process in Pakistan by providing a secure, transparent, and accessible digital platform that empowers every citizen to participate in the democratic process.
our_vision_desc: A Pakistan where every citizen can easily and securely participate in elections, ensuring a truly democratic and transparent electoral process.
invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
secure_access_desc: Secure access with CNIC/Email and Password
register_desc: Register with your CNIC and personal details to access secure digital voting.
cnic_verification_desc: Please verify your identity by entering your CNIC number and date of birth to continue voting.
verification_notice: Your entered details will only be used for verification and will not be stored permanently.
cnic_format_error: Please enter CNIC in format: 12345-1234567-1 (or 13 digits for overseas Pakistanis)
phone_format_error: Please enter a valid Pakistani phone number
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters long
password_lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
password_uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
password_number: Password must contain at least one number
password_special: Password must contain at least one special character
age_restriction: You must be 18 or older to register
